title: Choosing the Wrong Language Costs AI Teams Months of Work
summary: Darren Builds AI argues that choosing the right programming language is critical for AI development teams to avoid months of wasted effort. The video emphasizes that static typing, LSPs, type checking, and compile-time feedback mechanisms reduce runtime errors and improve collaboration on AI coding projects, advocating for TypeScript over Python.
